nodes.name: Webhook Trigger
nodes.notes: POST {serial_number, product_code, variant?, account_zoho_id?, contact_zoho_id?, purchase_date, warranty_type?}. Registers a new unit warranty.

parameters.query: INSERT INTO warranty_registrations (serial_number, product_code, variant, account_zoho_id, contact_zoho_id, purchase_date, warranty_start, warranty_end, warranty_type, invoice_zoho_id) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6::date, $6::date, $7::date, COALESCE($8, 'standard'), $9) RETURNING id, serial_number, warranty_start, warranty_end;

INSERT INTO event_log (event_type, entity_type, source, metadata) VALUES ('WarrantyRegistered', 'warranty', 'warranty_engine', jsonb_build_object('serial_number', $1, 'product_code', $2, 'warranty_end', $3));

meta.description: POST /webhook/warranty-register — Registers a new PB4000/MINIBOOM warranty. Calculates warranty_end based on type (12 months standard, 24 months extended). Logs to event_log.
